title: eruca vesicaria
intro: Eruca vesicaria, also known as rocket or arugula, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its peppery flavor and pungent aroma. The medicinal properties of Eruca vesicaria include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with consuming Eruca vesicaria include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Eruca vesicaria are often used in the form of teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is also commonly used as a culinary herb in salads and other dishes.
